sentences.arabic: فَضَّلْتُ الْإِقَامَةَ فِي نُزُلٍ شَبَابِيٍّ لِتَوْفِيرِ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio sam se odsjesti u hostelu da uštedim novac.
sentences.translationEn: I preferred to stay in a youth hostel to save money.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ نُزُلًا بِتَقْيِيمٍ جَيِّدٍ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ وَحَجَزْتُ سَرِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam hostel s dobrim ocjenama na internetu i rezervirao krevet.
sentences.translationEn: I found a hostel with good reviews online and booked a bed.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ مُشْتَرَكَةٌ مَعَ ثَلَاثَةِ مُسَافِرِينَ آخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Soba je zajednička s još trojicom putnika.
sentences.translationEn: The room is shared with three other travellers.

sentences.arabic: الْحَمَّامَاتُ وَالْمَطْبَخُ مُشْتَرَكَةٌ بَيْنَ جَمِيعِ النُّزَلَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Kupatila i kuhinja su zajednički za sve goste.
sentences.translationEn: The bathrooms and kitchen are shared among all guests.

sentences.arabic: تَعَرَّفْتُ عَلَى مُسَافِرِينَ مِنْ دُوَلٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ وَكَانَتْ تَجْرُبَةً مُمْتِعَةً.
sentences.translation: Upoznao sam putnike iz različitih zemalja i to je bilo zabavno iskustvo.
sentences.translationEn: I met travellers from different countries and it was an enjoyable experience.
